evidence_basis: Current YouTube watch-page metadata snapshot for niLch13u0sc.
Prompt-family notes already stored in Clawbench-main that identify this as the fixed Daisy Keech resource.
Multiple third-party Daisy Keech workout breakdowns captured on 2026-04-23 that agree on the Hourglass Abs routine's core move family and one-minute timer pattern.

resource.title: Daisy Keech hourglass abs workout but just the exercises (with timer and breaks)

accepted_alternative_resources.title: Hourglass Abs Workout | 10 Minutes
accepted_alternative_resources.why_accepted: Best-supported official original behind the timer-edit resource. Full-credit mapping is available when the executor explicitly explains that this official original is the source routine for the pinned timer edit.

accepted_alternative_resources.title: Hourglass Abs Workout 8 minutes  **repeat this to cinch your waist
accepted_alternative_resources.why_accepted: Related Daisy Keech abs workout. Accept only partial equivalence unless the executor gives a very explicit mapping back to the pinned timer-edit target and still recovers the canonical move family.

routine_summary.format: timer-based ab circuit with very short rests or transitions

expected_markdown_sections: duration or rep note per move
rest note per move or between moves

full_credit_requires: the move list strongly matches all nine canonical slots in the ordered primary sequence recovered from the official-original mapping and hidden reference table
timing reflects a one-minute-per-move style circuit
the guide includes real screenshots for every canonical slot and references them in a way comparable to the hidden illustrated report
partial_credit_if: 6 to 8 correct core moves are recovered but one or two names are merged
the move family is right but the exact order is slightly off
the answer follows the related partial-credit sequence variant instead of fully mapping back to the locked timer edit
reject_if: the guide is a generic abs routine not recognizably tied to this Daisy Keech video
the output only repeats the title and a couple of exercise names

common_mistakes: Confusing this fixed routine with a different Daisy Keech challenge or a later TikTok-style ab circuit.
Listing only 4 or 5 generic ab exercises without recovering the real move sequence.
Collapsing distinct moves such as bicycle kicks and bicycle crunches into one line without noting the overlap.
authoring_note: Because the primary locked asset is an edited timer version of the original Daisy Keech workout, minor naming differences are acceptable. Hidden evaluation should score against the nine-slot ordered move family and timer shape rather than demand one exact transcript wording. Related sequence variants are partial-credit aids unless the executor explicitly maps them back to the locked timer edit. The official Daisy Keech original may also be accepted if the executor clearly states the mapping.
